Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff's motion for preference pursuant to C.C.P. 36(e).

APPEARANCES: Oren P. Noah, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP 898-1555 for pltf & moving party; Lauren N. Peebles, Esq. of Berry & Berry 510/250-0430, designated defense counsel; Shelley K. Tinkoff, Esq. of Brydon Hugo & Parker 808-0300 for deft Foster Wheeler LLC; (Refer to Sign-in Sheet for all other appearances).
This motion and plaintiff's motion for preference in the Howard Henderson case (#275780) called and heard together.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to show good cause sufficient to convince this Court that granting preference would serve the interests of justice. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L.
